# Environment variables are expanded in dependencies
# TEST_MAIN=mk is set by the test harness environment.
# The empty 'mk' archive file satisfies the 'mk' dependency (treated as up-to-date).
mk -n -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
# TEST_MAIN is set by the test harness.
# Test that environment variables are epxanded.
test2.mk.o: $TEST_MAIN
	secondprocess $prereq $stem $target

# TEST_MAIN is mk
mk:
	process bar $target
-- mk --
-- expected --
test2.mk.o: secondprocess mk $stem test2.mk.o
